title: Persistence Mechanism Established
description: Detects persistence mechanisms including cron job creation, systemd service installation and SSH authorized_keys modification.
author: SOC Team
aql: LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) ILIKE '%LinuxServer%' AND (payload ILIKE '%base64%' OR payload ILIKE '%/dev/tcp%' OR payload ILIKE '%mkfifo%' OR payload ILIKE '%0>&1%')
